changes.value: Test `integration::model_commands::test_model_list_with_invalid_model_files` in `swissarmyhammer-cli/tests/integration/model_commands.rs` (line 586) panics with assertion "Should list valid model". The test expects `stdout.contains("valid-agent")` to be true after running `model list`, but the output does not contain the expected string. This is in the `swissarmyhammer-cli` package.

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-Test `integration::model_commands::test_model_list_with_invalid_model_files` in `swissarmyhammer-cli/tests/integration/model_commands.rs` (line 586) panics with assertion "Should list valid model". The test expects `stdout.contains("valid-agent")` to be true after running `model list`, but the output does not contain the expected string. This is in the `swissarmyhammer-cli` package.
\ No newline at end of file
